title: Paris City Break
description: Explore the Eiffel Tower, Louvre Museum, and charming Montmartre cafes.

title: Tokyo Adventure
description: Experience Shibuya, traditional temples, sushi markets, and bullet train day trips.

title: Bali Wellness Retreat
description: Yoga sessions, rice terrace hikes, spa treatments, and beach sunsets.

title: Swiss Alps Hiking
description: Guided alpine trails, lake cruises, and scenic train rides through the mountains.

title: Safari in Serengeti
description: Wildlife safaris, luxury lodges, and the great migration viewing experience.

title: New York Highlights
description: Broadway show, Central Park, Times Square, and iconic skyline views.

title: Greek Island Hopping
description: White-washed villages, Aegean beaches, local tavernas, and ferry island tours.

title: Costa Rica Eco Tour
description: Cloud forest canopy walks, zip-lining, volcano hikes, and sustainable eco-lodges.
